headline: Newmont Corp (NYSE:NEM) Earnings Beat but Revenue Miss Highlights Mixed Quarter
summary: Newmont Q2 2026 earnings beat forecasts with $2.10 EPS, but revenue missed at $6.12B amid lower gold prices and Cadia disruptions. Stock dipped 0.4% after-hours.

headline: Intel Could Swing By $68.3 Billion After Earnings
summary: Earnings back in focus on Thursday, with a Benzinga-selected watchlist including Intel and Lockheed Martin. Options markets suggest a 4.64% swing for LMT and a 5.95% move for TMUS. Both have Buy ratings, but LMT is trading below analyst price forecast.
